title: stachys bolusii
intro: Stachys bolusii, also known as the woolly hedgehog, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the southwestern and southern parts of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Stachys bolusii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile treatment option for various ailments.
